rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule dll_injection_thread : feature dll injection windows
{
	meta:
		description = "Injection using kernel32.dll:VirtualAllocEx"

	strings:
		$load_01 = "LoadLibraryA"
		$remote_01 = "NtCreateThreadEx"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "VirtualAllocEx" ) ) and ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "WriteProcessMemory" ) or pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "LoadLibraryExA" ) or pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "LoadLibraryExW" ) or ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetProcAddress" ) and ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetModuleHandleA" ) or pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetModuleHandleA" ) ) and $load_01 ) ) and ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "CreateRemoteThread" ) or pe.imports ( "ntdll.dll" , "NtCreateThreadEx" ) or ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetProcAddress" ) and ( pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetModuleHandleA" ) or pe.imports ( "kernel32.dll" , "GetModuleHandleA" ) ) and $remote_01 ) )
}

import "pe"

rule dll_injection_hook : feature dll injection windows
{
	meta:
		description = "Injection using User32.dll:VirtualAllocEx"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and ( pe.imports ( "user32.dll" , "SetWindowsHookExA" ) or pe.imports ( "user32.dll" , "SetWindowsHookExW" ) )
}
